issues.message: Missing optional columns (will be treated as empty): ['description']
305 rows have invalid targeting value (must be 'True' or 'False', title case): {'TRUE': 280, 'FALSE': 25}

280 targeting rows have intended_target coords that do not span all guides in their guide-prefix group — 56 groups affected (likely per-guide assignment instead of per-group); e.g. ['ADAMTS7', 'ALDH2', 'BMP1', 'CDKN2B', 'COL3A1']
description column is present but all empty — recommend filling with guide group name (guide_id stripped of trailing _N)
